textByHash.1e74a3fcc3b72d71487e91d6f561d8ad435f7c26: Try the top floor, south eastern bay.
textByHash.282ec7b22e27e93ba48ac147ac8f23724a367f35: Those practices have long since been abolished though and Kourend is now ruled by the Kourend Council. The original Accord has since been lost, but copies still exist in this library.
textByHash.3f895648e509d838a7e252558c6d5a38a623e0fa: Try the bottom floor, north western bay.
textByHash.54deafe3e212a555ee00f7d6cc95ad4fdf9c1521: The Royal Accord of Twill was signed by the heads of Kourend's five houses, known then as the Royal Lords. This was over a thousand years ago.
textByHash.6f1a0ad5caf3c386f1fce84a973ee2882ba77307: For many years after the Accord was signed, the Royal Lords took it in turns to rule the kingdom. Each of them ruled for ten years in turn.
textByHash.788333524f0ed7e834d2700d781674a3a21c3fed: It details how the original Accord was lost.
textByHash.8200088112c433d2d02e7f9f1a7f5d3e6bfc5a77: Try the middle floor, south eastern bay.
textByHash.91de99152f5379827d97cecbf8770222cb6f1fa4: Many have tried and failed. You would likely have no better luck. However, if it interests you, you might wish to read The Envoy to Varlamore, by Deryk Paulson.
textByHash.983eecdaaeeb8ef41cfbb958527bb5ade61001f0: Try the middle floor, north eastern bay.
textByHash.9ffc5c42cdbe5312125be7e7a969a1b7406832f8: The Accord declared that they would take over rulership of Great Kourend from the Council of Elders.
textByHash.a7f858cfff608024ba2352964001ba0f0ed24c50: Try the top floor, north western bay.
textByHash.b2aa68b9c8f7329b9c37536a4e691f7d990fe09f: Try the middle floor, south western bay.
textByHash.ba55d8f55a3b2c6dd59f649859aa193b358daf74: No time to talk I'm afraid.
textByHash.bd16d14a9f228b7f3c205bd0edb5886472071e20: Try the top floor, south western bay.
textByHash.be76067da56e4b418037a34b69254bf2b7c34bf9: Try the bottom floor, north eastern bay.
textByHash.c5087c3e40999751a867c9b57a1cafac99fbd13a: Try the top floor, north eastern bay.
textByHash.c855e019bdb8cec46d84a166064540880f000d0c: Try the middle floor, north western bay.
textByHash.fc1e0a4202ca3964838acc6cbd4a63996d0df605: Try the bottom floor, south western bay.
textByHash.fe2cfd1bac7d408702fb39d77c083c5b84a9e7ab: Try the bottom floor, south eastern bay.
